news.t: Bet on Cyclicals with These Two Small-Cap ETFs

holdings.infoBox: URTY is an equity ETF with a total of 1918 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares UltraPro Russell2000 (URTY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund provides 3x leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of US small-cap companies. URTY was launched on Feb 11, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Bet on Cyclicals with These Two Small-Cap ETFs
data.text: Here's why cyclical stocks may outpace their large-cap counterparts in the weeks ahead. Capitalize on the trend with these Russell 2000 ETFs.
